markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to explore a content partnership between GrowthX and Unify.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Unify's AI-only content workflow (Profound + n8n) requires excessive manual editing to fix inaccuracies and an unengaging "AI-sounding" tone, creating a significant bottleneck for Charlie.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Goal:** Scale high-quality, human-vetted content for SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) to drive organic growth, targeting 5–7 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX's end-to-end service combines complex AI workflows with expert human oversight to deliver accurate, on-brand content at scale, solving Unify's quality and volume issues.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** A follow-up call is set for Monday, Nov 10, at 4:30 PM CT with Unify's founder, Austin. Tyler will send a SoW and add Charlie to a shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)

## Topics

### Unify's Content Challenge

  - [**Background:** Unify's founder, Austin, previously built the growth engine at Ramp. Unify is a streamlined GTM platform consolidating intent signals, prospecting, and sequencing into one tool.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Current Workflow:** An automated system using Profound and n8n generates articles for the "Explore" page.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Key Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**Quality:** Content has an unengaging, "AI-sounding" tone.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Accuracy:** Frequent AI hallucinations and incorrect citations require extensive manual fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [**Bottleneck:** Charlie spends late evenings editing 3+ articles/day, making the workflow unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Goal:** Publish 5–7 high-quality articles/week to improve SEO/AEO and build long-term organic authority.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** An end-to-end partnership, not just an agency, providing strategy, creation, and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Core Differentiator:** Combines complex AI workflows with expert human oversight (Managing Director, Editor, Content Manager) to ensure quality and accuracy at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
      - [**Strategy Sprint:** Develops an SEO/GEO roadmap based on ICP analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
      - [**Execution:** Publishes daily to the CMS, with Unify's only task being draft review.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [**Content Examples:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [**Ramp Vendor Directory:** Interactive charts with spend data to establish authority.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [**Town (Accounting):** Accurate tax advice using a fact-checker agent and integrated brand quotes.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
      - [**Augment Code:** Technical content (e.g., "What is a REST API?") to capture long-tail search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

### Pricing & Logistics

  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** $30k for a 4-week engagement, delivering a 6-month roadmap and 10 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Growth Execution):** $15k/month for ongoing content creation (target: 5–7 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [**Timeline:** GrowthX has high demand and can only commit to two new clients per week. A decision by end-of-month would secure a January start.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [**Assets:** Unify has a comprehensive brand hub (built with Profound) containing voice guidelines, competitor analysis, and other inputs, which could accelerate the kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2047.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Charlie:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
      - [Share Unify's brand hub with Tyler.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2084.0)
      - [Send 2 example articles representing the desired quality.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
      - [Confirm Austin's availability for the follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
      - [Add Charlie to a shared Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
      - [Send the Statement of Work (SoW) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
      - [Conduct competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
      - [Meet for a 30-min follow-up call on **Monday, Nov 10, at 4:30 PM CT** with Austin (Unify founder).](https://fathom.video/share/jJssE1DJX4xVdzQyncb9CpWG_qPPqBv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
